name: wxcode-admin-pulse-crm
title: Pulse CRM Admin
description: Airy light-mode sales CRM admin — left sidebar with workspace switcher, topbar with search and filters, 4 pipeline KPI tiles with sparklines, horizontal pipeline-by-stage strip, recent deals table with stage pills, and a right-side activity and tasks panel. Sky-blue accent on a white/slate canvas.

query.en: Build me a CRM admin dashboard for a sales team — left sidebar with workspace switcher, topbar with search and filters, 4 pipeline KPI tiles, pipeline-by-stage strip, recent deals table, and an activity/tasks side panel.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build me a CRM admin dashboard for a sales team — left sidebar with workspace switcher, topbar with search and filters, 4 pipeline KPI tiles, pipeline-by-stage strip, recent deals table, and an activity/tasks side panel.

provenance.note: category design-language reference only; original implementation
